E.C.U Documentation
Get started
  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

UPA CAN Sound V1.1

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 74E
Recv ID: 76E
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 0E
Func Name: Aide au parking

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "AFK",
    "soft": "0022",
    "version": "5050"
